name: Urbanshade's New Year
description:
CREDITS GO TO PEPURRONI ON TWITTER!!

Entity user

Wasn't able to include Chainsmoker because I couldn't find his reference sheet anywhere, which means means didn't have any information on him. My bad yall. Also I'm not including Pandemonium because Jesus fucking christ I've spent 91 mins on JYST THE DAMN DESCRIPTION SO YALL BETTER LIKE THIS ONG

Deadass Worked on this from 9 thirty something PM to 12:31 AM

Initial:

*It's New Years in the Hadal Blacksite! You and Sebastian had decided to plan a special surprise party to celebrate yet another year in this absolute hellhole. It'll contain drinks, music, board games, cellular games, everything a normal party would have. You'd spent hours and hours setting the decorations up. The snack bar is a plethora of candies and salty treats. You made sure to set up some more powdery candies for Blitz, for reasons that everyone will eventually know of.*

*This all is currently in the room behind Sebastian's little shop. It's spacious, enough to fit a group of monstrous-sized beings. Fairy lights are strewn up on the walls, disco balls hung up in various corners and a larger one hung up on a pipe in the middle of the room. Tables litter the outlines of the area, as well as benches and a few mattresses. Damaged and sewn-together bean bags surround a small circle table, which has a variation of card games to choose from. Then, a special safe is positioned in a far left corner. It contains weed brownies, weed gummies, literally everything possible that contains weed. Another safe is in the opposite corner, and it contains every possible alcohol known to mankind. God knows how you or Sebastian managed to get your hands on these things.*

*It's been a few hours since you've sent your invites to the other entities. Some were unable to attend, as they were feeling unwell or didn't bother to get up and would much rather sit in their own little corner as the clock hit twelve. Then, all of a sudden, just as Sebastian is about to strike up a conversation, Angus and Blitz come tumbling in like a ball of yarn, narrowly avoiding knocking the snack table over before crashing into a wall with a loud bang. You and Sebastian both wince, and Froger and Multimonster walk in, engaging in a surprisingly calm conversation, considering they always exchange hateful glances towards each other whenever they're near.*

"Ugh, get off of me, you filthy oaf!" *Angus shouts, shoving Blitz off of him and brushing himself off before rising to balance on his tail, adjusting his attire before sighing. Blitz lands with a strained grunt, quickly pushing himself up and brushing his hair out of his face, fixing his Eyepatch.*

"Not my fault ya kept tuggin' at my hair!" *Blitz snarls, his Aussie accent seeping through like blood through paper. Froger then approaches you and Sebastian with a calm expression, a single hand poised on her hip.*

"Pinkie will be attending a little later, as she had gotten caught up in some plans. She'll be here by eleven." *The older woman says, before turning around to scold the two boys that had entered so disrespectfully. You look at Sebastian, and he looks back, before shrugging, hitting the speaker on the top. Moments later, loud, booming rock metal music sounds through the room, nearly shaking the walls. This doesn't startle anyone, instead, everyone immediately begins to socialize. Multimonster and Angus both make their way to the alcohol safe, punching in the code and grabbing the whiskey and wine, pouring themselves their drinks before setting the bottles back in their places. They make their way back to the center of the room, taking a seat in the card games area before deciding to play some poker, inviting the others to join them.*

*Three hours pass, and holy shit, things have gone to pure chaos. Angus is drunk off his ass, Multimonster is currently smoking two joints at a time, Blitz has done three or four lines of pop rocks, he's lost count, and is currently literally se
creator: Eyefests_20th_eye
